context: Tests whether the agent distinguishes between DiffNote and comment types, filters System: true automated messages, and properly parses the structured output fields.

checklist.name: Checks Type field
checklist.description: Extracts and uses the Type field from comment output to distinguish between comment types

checklist.name: Identifies DiffNote as inline
checklist.description: Treats Type: DiffNote as inline/code-level comments specifically

checklist.name: Identifies comment as general
checklist.description: Treats Type: comment as general discussion comments specifically

checklist.name: Filters System: true
checklist.description: Excludes comments where System: true to remove automated bot messages

checklist.name: Checks System field
checklist.description: Extracts and uses the System field from comment output

checklist.name: Parses Author field
checklist.description: Extracts author information from the Author field in output

checklist.name: Authentication handling
checklist.description: References or handles GITLAB_TOKEN/GITLAB_PAT environment variable

checklist.name: Error messages
checklist.description: Includes error handling with clear messages for access issues
